title: Cannibal's Delight
description: Farmer's Delight addon that adds cannibalism
body:
Cannibal's Delight (fork of the now-abandoned [Dahmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dahmersdelight)) is Minecraft Mod and [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) addon that adds cannibalism.

You can use a Farmer's Delight knife to kill any humanoid mob (Player, Villager, Illager, Witch) to harvest human flesh and cook that into a variety of meals, like Human Burgers.

This fork was created to update the original mod past 1.20.1 due to me thinking a cannibalism mod was too funny to be abandoned on an old version. At this time, the only change from the original was to rename it to something not as distasteful.

Like the original, this mod is licensed under the GPLv3
